rationale: Educ. Code §12.1282 governs transfer of state-funded charter school property to districts. It is unrelated to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The agency may approve the transfer of property described by Section 12.128 from an open-enrollment charter school that has ceased to operate
_note: Rule text concerns charter school property transfers; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation.
